steps.title: Use the contrast about ambition
steps.content: The casual description makes the mural sound like a simple coffee-shop painting, but the sentence then contrasts that impression with the work's actual complexity and seriousness. The blank must mean modest or not obviously impressive.

steps.title: Reject mismatched word meanings
steps.content: Choice A means out of place, which is not the issue. Choice B means clever or calculating. Choice C means trying to seem more important than something is, which is the opposite of the surface impression described. The answer is D.
